name: meshy_generate_model
description: Generate a 3D model using Meshy.ai. Call without refine_task_id to create a new model (preview/mesh stage). Call with refine_task_id to add textures to a completed preview (refine stage). After calling, poll with meshy_check_task until complete. IMPORTANT: This costs Meshy.ai credits (5-20 for preview, 10 for texturing). If the user has not explicitly asked you to generate a 3D model, you MUST ask for their confirmation before calling this tool. If the user directly requested model generation, proceed without asking.

prompt.description: Text description of the 3D model to generate, e.g. 'a medieval wooden treasure chest with iron bands'. Required for preview, ignored for refine.

refine_task_id.description: If set, creates a refine (texturing) task for this completed preview task ID instead of a new preview.

ai_model.description: Meshy AI model version. Default: 'meshy-4'. Higher versions produce better quality but may cost more credits.

target_polycount.description: Target polygon count (triangles). Range: 100-300000. You MUST always set this based on asset type: hero/character assets up to 100000, environment assets (buildings, terrain pieces) up to 10000, props (items, furniture, small objects) up to 3000. Infer the asset type from the prompt.

enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR texture maps (metallic, roughness, normal) during refine. Default: true.

texture_prompt.description: Optional additional guidance for texturing during refine stage.
